privileged_info_summary: All task metadata is verified and internally consistent. The task involves three products: Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E (120 initial units, 25 to scrap), Heavy Duty Pallet Jack - 5500lb (18 initial units, 4 to scrap), and Corrugated Shipping Box - 24x18x12 (500 initial units, 85 to scrap). A synthetic damage assessment report is placed at /home/ga/Desktop/damage_assessment_report.txt. The task is synthetic—all products, inventory quantities, and the damage report are created by setup scripts rather than sourced from real-world data.
